project_context.domain: Property Management (Copropriété), Finance & Accounting, Real Estate

theme.description: Objective, rigid, functional-first. High data density requires clarity over decoration. 95% of UI is monochrome. Signal colors are reserved strictly for actions and status indicators. Fits perfectly for dense, trust-critical financial and property management software.

headings.style: Swiss brutalist edge. Tight tracking. Variable weights (Black for emphasis, Light for elegance). Never center by default.
headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-5xl font-black tracking-tighter text-slate-950

body.style: Sterile, highly legible monospace-adjacent sans for dense data and accounting grids.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
layout_and_spacing.description: Density, Data Correlation, Scanability. Tight gaps, structural alignment. Ideal for complex accounting and property modules.
layout_and_spacing.base_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8. Inner card padding must be generous (p-6) to prevent text collision.

patterns.dashboard_wrapper: F-pattern. Left collapsible sidebar. Top-left most important KPI.
patterns.widgets: Span logic: Summary (col-span-3), Main Chart (col-span-6 row-span-2), List/Feed (col-span-3 row-span-2). Every pixel utilized, h-full on children.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0055FF] text-white font-semibold rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-[#0040CC] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0055FF]/50 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 font-semibold rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors

forms_and_inputs.strategy: Shadcn modified. Strict 1px borders, subtle focus rings.
forms_and_inputs.labels: text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 uppercase tracking-wide mb-1

tables.strategy: Dense, high-data capacity. Hover states on rows.
tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-600 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider py-3 px-4 border-b border-slate-200
tables.cell: py-3 px-4 text-sm text-slate-700 border-b border-slate-100

charts.style: Monochrome with signal color highlights. No 3D effects. Clean tooltips.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle background shifts, slight lifts (-translate-y-[1px]) for cards.
motion_and_interactions.loaders: Linear indeterminate progress bars at top of sections, avoid bulky spinners.

icons_and_assets.usage: Stroke width 1.5, sizes 16px to 20px. Keep them sharp and unobtrusive.

login_hero_bg.description: Generated image. Abstract geometric architectural shapes in light gray and off-white. Use this for the auth split-screen background.

modern_building.description: Black and white concrete building. Good for marketing portal hero if needed.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast ratios. Text on brand primary must be white.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, tabs, table rows) MUST have descriptive data-testid attributes formatted in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: All focusable elements must have visible focus rings.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize data density and clarity over flashy visuals.
Use pure HTML and Tailwind for any marketing/login layouts, and customized Shadcn for the main dashboard (tables, forms, dialogs).
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Chivo' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Integrate them via Google Fonts.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard. Use F-pattern layout with a left collapsible sidebar.
Customize Shadcn components to have 1px solid borders (`border-slate-200`) and slight `rounded-md` corners. Avoid heavy drop shadows.
Never use full-screen gradients. Keep UI primarily monochrome with signal colors (Blue, Red, Green) mapping exactly to semantic actions.
Apply real Belgian PCMN accounting rules and CODA import flows structurally. Visually group accounting vs property management vs billing widgets cleanly.
Use the provided media image URLs for auth backgrounds and visual textures.
